title: Farty
body:
![farty-banner](https://i.imgur.com/WQifNHL.png)
Sneak around like never before and leave a funny trail of "farts" behind you. This cheeky plugin lets you emit cool particle effects as you sneak in the game. Customize your sneaky style by choosing the type of particles, the sound effect, and where the magic happens, all through a simple config file. It's a barrel of laughs and loads of fun for you and your friends. Embrace the silliness with Farty plugin and bring some extra giggles to your world!

Sneak and let it rip!

---

[Demo](https://youtu.be/x7fTi1fb63A)

Plug and Play
Download and put it in your plugins folder.

---

Commands

    /fartreload - Reloads the configuration of the plugin.

Config
```
# Configuration file for Farty

# Particle settings
# https://hub.spigotmc.org/javadocs/spigot/org/bukkit/Particle.html
particle: SNEEZE
particle_offset_x: 0.0
particle_offset_y: 0.1
particle_offset_z: -0.3

# Fart Chance in percentage
# Value of 0.5 means there is a 50% chance of the fart effect happening (it will happen about half of the time).
fart_chance: 0.5

# Sound settings
# https://hub.spigotmc.org/javadocs/bukkit/org/bukkit/Sound.html
sound: ENTITY_CREEPER_PRIMED
```
